title: Blood Hunters: Rise of the Hybrids
original_title: Blood Hunters: Rise of the Hybrids
overview: An avenging aswang killer teams up with a hybrid and a team of demon hunters to attack the lair of the most powerful underworld warlords, only to find themselves in a twisted trap and a fight to the death.
